title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Medical Officer with drive and ambition, GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
